name: 7-day-web-design
description: Codex-ready plugin for a seven-day framework-agnostic web design workflow.

interface.shortDescription: A seven-day design sprint for web product work.
interface.longDescription: Guides product and feature design from brief through handoff with explicit deliverables for framework-agnostic web experiences.
defaultPrompt: Run a seven-day design sprint for this web product idea.
Turn this feature request into a web design plan.
Prepare a structured web design handoff for this flow.
